hero.tagline: Deroua Association for Culture and Arts
hero.subtitle: Celebrating creativity and elevating culture in all its forms — theater, music, visual arts, and literature.

about.title: A Cultural Association with an Artist's Heart
about.body: Founded with a genuine passion for reviving cultural heritage and supporting local creativity, Deroua Association believes that art is not a luxury but a human necessity. We strive to create an open space that brings together artists, intellectuals, and audiences.

events.title: Dates Not to Miss
events.subtitle: Join us for a rich series of cultural and artistic events

event1.title: Performance: Voices from Another Time
event1.description: An extraordinary theatrical performance reimagining heritage tales in a contemporary and captivating style.

event2.title: An Andalusian Musical Evening
event2.description: A refined musical evening celebrating the ancient Andalusian heritage through distinctive local voices.

event3.title: Exhibition: Colors of the City
event3.description: A collective art exhibition exploring the artist's relationship with their city through color and form.

gallery.title: Moments from Our Events
gallery.subtitle: Memories that unite us, images that tell unforgettable stories

about_page.hero_subtitle: The story of passion for art and culture in the heart of Deroua
about_page.mission_title: Art as Message, Culture as Home
about_page.mission_body: Deroua Association for Culture and Arts was founded in 2013 by a group of intellectuals and artists who believed that art is not a luxury but a human necessity. Since its founding, the association has become a vibrant space bringing creators and audiences together in a continuous celebration of cultural heritage and contemporary creativity.
about_page.value1_body: We believe culture and art are rights for all, and strive to remove barriers between creator and audience.
about_page.value2_body: We celebrate local talents and give them the platforms they deserve to shine and reach wider audiences.
about_page.value3_body: We bridge authenticity and modernity, preserving heritage while innovating in forms of expression.
about_page.value4_body: We build an arts-literate community, capable of creation, critique, and positive cultural engagement.
about_page.milestone1_body: The association launched with a group of passionate founders dedicated to art and culture in Deroua.
about_page.milestone2_body: Organizing the first cultural festival that brought together over 500 spectators across three days.
about_page.milestone3_body: Partnerships with cultural associations in neighboring cities and the launch of a mobile arts program.
about_page.milestone4_body: More than 60 annual events and a network of over 200 artists and cultural partners.

events_page.hero_subtitle: Discover our continuously renewed cultural program throughout the year
events_page.no_events: No upcoming events at this time

contact_page.hero_subtitle: We are delighted to hear from you and answer all your inquiries
contact_page.success_body: Thank you for reaching out. We will get back to you as soon as possible.
